title: Resource Browser (Define Structure)
text: Resource Browser (Define Structure) Use the Resource Browser to create or select entities and fields in the component structure. Tabs Templates —use templates to create component entities and fields that do not have database access. Inserting an object from the Templates tab creates a copy that you can then rename. Model —use modeled entities and their fields to create derived component entities that access a data store. Inserting a modeled entity or field creates a component entity or field that inherits from the modeled object. How to Add Objects from the Resource Browser Filter and Search for Objects in Resource Browser Define the Component Structure Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
